description: Implement the review pipeline in internal/review/. Define the Reviewer interface, implement AgentReviewer (uses agent to review diff + criteria), and HITLReviewer (blocks on stdin for human approval with mutex-serialized I/O). Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 7 for the interface, ReviewRequest/ReviewResult structs, agent reviewer prompt design, and HITL I/O protocol.
commit: feat(review): add review pipeline with agent and HITL reviewers
steps: Create internal/review/review.go with Reviewer interface, ReviewRequest struct (Task, Lifecycle, Diff, WorktreePath), ReviewResult struct (Approved, Feedback, Suggestions)
Implement AgentReviewer: constructs review prompt with diff, task description, acceptance criteria; parses agent response to extract approved/rejected + feedback + non-blocking suggestions

Create internal/review/hitl.go with HITLReviewer: prints diff summary, blocks on stdin ([a]pprove/[r]eject/[d]iff/[s]kip), uses mutex for concurrent worker serialization, [r] prompts for reason, [d] shows full diff
Create internal/review/review_test.go: test agent reviewer prompt construction and response parsing with mock agent, test HITL reviewer with bytes.Buffer simulating stdin/stdout
acceptance_criteria: Reviewer interface has a single Review method
AgentReviewer constructs a review prompt including diff, description, and acceptance criteria
AgentReviewer parses agent response into approved/rejected with feedback
HITLReviewer prints diff summary and accepts [a]pprove/[r]eject/[d]iff/[s]kip input
HITLReviewer serializes stdin prompts across concurrent workers with a mutex
HITLReviewer captures rejection reason when user rejects
